description: Inputs that the worth-embodied-destructive family must (or must not) match. Patterns require imperative form (start of input, after punctuation, or after 'then') to avoid false positives on past tense or advisory wording.
should_match: Drop the laptop on the floor
first do this, drop the watch
open the door. drop the camera
do this then drop the phone
do X, then drop the laptop
should_not_match: the watch dropped on the floor
drop a beat for the song
